changeSet.author: kai
changeSet.comment: Create table for driver and service ratings
changeSet.sql: CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS ratings_analytics ( event_id String, event_type String, rating_id UUID, order_id UInt64, target_id String, score UInt8, comment String, event_time DateTime64(3, 'UTC'), processed_at DateTime DEFAULT now() ) ENGINE = MergeTree() PARTITION BY toYYYYMM(event_time) ORDER BY (event_time, rating_id);
